title: helianthocereus escayachensis
intro: Helianthocereus escayachensis is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, inflammation, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Helianthocereus escayachensis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
